lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on both the interior and exterior. Major systems require repair or replacement, and the vehicle is not currently in good working order.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant damage and wear. Mechanical systems are currently failing and require substantial repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the roof and hood, along with several visible scratches and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery shows moderate wear but remains functional. Mechanically, it runs reliably, though it may benefit from some minor maintenance in the near future. It is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable car at an affordable price point.

Get ready for a true diamond in the rough! This vehicle has lived a long, full life and is currently in poor condition with significant wear, making it the perfect choice for a dedicated mechanic or someone looking for a total project car at a bargain price.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show its age through visible wear and tear. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a few small dings consistent with its history, while the interior upholstery shows typical thinning and some staining. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but the buyer should expect to perform some upcoming maintenance, such as a brake service and addressing a minor oil seep. It is a solid, functional option for anyone needing dependable transportation without the price tag of a newer model.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting meticulous preservation both mechanically and aesthetically. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of engineering excellence, this offering represents an investment-grade opportunity without compromise.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in stunning, like-new condition. Not a single scratch to be found—it still feels and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. I'm looking for someone who will love it as much as I do, so come take a look and see for yourself!
Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in showroom condition. The S5
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of bolster wear, while the original carpeting is protected by factory mats. Every electronic component, from the climate control to the infotainment system, functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history and a smooth, powerful drive that feels as tight as the day it left the assembly line. For the collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the definitive choice.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are indistinguishable from new, offering an unparalleled acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior and a flawless interior, reflecting a level of care that borders on the obsessive. Every mechanical component operates with the precision of its initial delivery. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a truly showroom-quality acquisition, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m absolutely thrilled to show you this beauty! Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for a new home, you’ve found it! Can't wait for you to see it in person!
Available is an investment-grade E92 M3, preserved in concours-level condition. This specimen features the high-revving S65 4
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior. Pre-purchase inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. With a full documented service history and incredibly low mileage, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. It is, quite simply, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare find, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Engineering integrity and aesthetic perfection define this offering, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute quality, this vehicle stands as the definitive choice.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained in showroom condition with uncompromising attention to detail. Every surface reflects a standard of care synonymous with collector-grade quality. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle with an impeccable pedigree and flawless presentation, this offering stands without peer.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It’s honestly in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a car that’s basically flawless and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Pristine vehicle. Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive care, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats are supple and free of wear, while the dashboard and trim pieces are entirely unmarked. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service record from certified technicians and performing exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor. Every button, switch, and feature functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained to the highest possible standard.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in pristine, showroom-quality condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains entirely indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this unit offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled integrity and aesthetic excellence. A definitive investment for those who demand nothing less than the superlative.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This meticulously maintained example represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care that exceeds expectations, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is an acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been meticulously cared for, drives like a total dream, and looks absolutely stunning inside and out. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This 2004 BMW M3 is an exemplary specimen of the E46 chassis, maintained to an uncompromising standard. Under the hood, the S54 3.2L inline-six remains in peak mechanical health, characterized by its signature 8,000 RPM redline and razor-sharp throttle response via six individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise gate engagement, paired with a fresh clutch assembly. Critical preventative maintenance is complete, including a comprehensive dual-VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement. Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspections welcome.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, high-gloss finish with no swirl marks, dings, or stone chips, complemented by pristine original alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear on the bolsters, and the interior still retains its new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. It has been exclusively garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. This is a collector-grade specimen that drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line, offering a level of refinement and preservation that is truly difficult to find.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and exhibiting no discernible signs of wear. Meticulously curated for the discerning enthusiast, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class, offering peerless mechanical integrity and an immaculate aesthetic profile. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and distinguished provenance.
